summary: Implemented workflow durable run event history v1. Added pure event schema/build/idempotency helpers in workflows.py, app-owned workflow_events.jsonl append helpers, /workflow run/continue/cancel event emission, and /workflow trace event rendering. Preserved runner v0 and bridge ownership boundaries; no workflow-owned executor, tools, timers, parallel DAG, A2A/MCP service, or direct ledger side effects were added.
